commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

后续需要重新设计 URL 检测的实现方式：

- 不影响实时终端交互

repository.name: cligool
repository.description: CLI GoOnline

commit.message:
fix(pluginModuleParseEnd): replace fixed build timeout with idle timeout (#443)

* fix(pluginModuleParseEnd): replace fixed build timeout with idle timeout

Previously moduleParseTimeout was a fixed timer starting from build
initialization. On large codebases where build time exceeds the timeout
value, the promise resolved prematurely causing missing usedRemotes in
remoteEntry and "Failed to locate remote" errors at runtime.

Now the timer resets on every moduleParsed event, so it only fires when
there has been no module activity for the configured duration — i.e. the
build is genuinely stuck, not just slow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(pluginModuleParseEnd): add moduleParseIdleTimeout alongside moduleParseTimeout

Keep moduleParseTimeout as a fixed build timer (backward compatible).
Add moduleParseIdleTimeout as an alternative that resets on every parsed
module, firing only when no module activity occurs for the configured
duration. Prefer moduleParseIdleTimeout for large codebases where total
build time exceeds the fixed timeout value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update README and add changeset for moduleParseIdleTimeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix TV player: enable CC/gear navigation with two-mode focus

When controls are hidden, the root Box has Compose focus and
onPreviewKeyEvent handles seek/play/show. When controls become visible,
focus switches to the AndroidView so key events reach PlayerView's
internal controller natively — enabling D-pad navigation between
play/pause, seek bar, CC (subtitles), and gear (audio tracks) buttons.
Focus switches back to the Box when controls auto-hide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: v8.5.0 — PyJWT, structured output y mejoras de prompts CoT

Seguridad:
- Reemplazado python-jose (CVE activo, sin mantenimiento) por PyJWT>=2.9.0
- Eliminado passlib de requirements.txt (no se usaba; bcrypt directo)
- datetime.utcnow() → datetime.now(timezone.utc) en api/auth.py

Agentes — salida estructurada:
- AgenteEspecialista acepta output_schema (Pydantic) opcional
- Usa llm.with_structured_output(schema) cuando se provee schema
- factory.py pasa SalidaJurista/SalidaAuditor/SalidaCronista a cada agente
- parse_json_seguro mantiene como fallback (Ollama/dev local)

Prompts — técnicas de prompt engineering:
- CoT con bloque <razonamiento> en los 3 agentes (ignorado por el parser)
- Few-shot en Jurista: ejemplo externas vs. internas
- Árbol de decisión de 4 pasos en Auditor por cada referencia
- Severidad dinámica ALTA/MEDIA/BAJA (antes hardcodeado a ALTA)

Docs: README y ARQUITECTURA actualizados a v8.5.0

for uid 1000".

commit.message:
fix: File size check scanned gitignored files, blocking all scoring

The check-file-sizes action used `find data/ -size +5M` which scanned
ALL files on disk including gitignored ones. When diary-shows.json (13MB)
and mezzanine-productions-raw.json appeared in data/, this blocked 15
workflows including LLM scoring (5 consecutive failures today).

Fix: Only check files staged for commit via `git diff --cached`.
This is the correct behavior — we want to prevent large files from being
committed, not from existing on disk.

fix: 移除清屏拦截，只保留 URL 检测功能

问题：
- 清屏拦截影响 TUI 应用（如 iflow）的正常显示
- TUI 应用需要真正的清屏来正确更新界面

调整：
- 移除 ScreenCleaner 清屏拦截功能
- 只保留 URL 检测功能
- 数据透明传输，不修改任何内容

现在的行为：
- URL 仍然会被检测并显示在 Web 界面顶部
- TUI 应用可以正常清屏和更新界面
- 用户可以通过顶部 URL 栏访问所有检测到的链接

commit.message:
Add daily macOS notification for the bible verse of the day

On startup, show_random_bible_quote() now calls _send_verse_notification()
which fires a native macOS notification (via osascript) with the verse
text as the body and the scripture reference as the subtitle.

The notification is guarded by notification_state.json so it fires at
most once per calendar day regardless of how many times the app opens.
Quotes in the verse text are escaped to prevent osascript syntax errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: delta robustness — token guard, full reconciliation, test overhaul (#180)

* docs: comprehensive delta endpoint research — ci_issues.md §17-§20 + backlog items

Research findings from abraunegg/onedrive, rclone, restic, and Microsoft docs:
- §17: Delta deletions "sent only once" — can be permanently missed
- §17: How rclone (no delta), abraunegg (full scans), Microsoft (periodic full enum) handle this
- §19: Cross-test contamination from shared drive + folder-scoped delta broken on Business
- §20: Token advancement on zero-event responses — the mechanism behind permanent deletion loss
- B-324/B-325/B-326: Backlog items for remote_path filtering, periodic reconciliation, token investigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: delta robustness — zero-event token guard, full reconciliation, test overhaul

Production code:
- Zero-event token guard: don't advance delta token when 0 events returned
  (observeAndCommitRemote + Watch loop). Replaying costs O(1); prevents
  advancing past still-propagating deletions. (B-326)
- Full reconciliation: observeRemoteFull() + Baseline.FindOrphans() detect
  items in baseline but absent from full enumeration = missed deletions.
  Three access modes: sync --full (manual), daemon periodic (24h default),
  programmatic. (B-325)
- sync --full CLI flag with --watch mutual exclusivity
- Periodic reconciliation timer in RunWatch select loop

Test changes:
- De-parallelize deletion-dependent E2E tests (DeletePropagation,
  EmptyDirectory, NestedDeletion, BigDeleteProtection) — sequential
  execution eliminates cross-test delta contamination
- Add registerLogDump(t) to 7 tests missing CI debug output
- Add t.Parallel() to 5 upload-only tests
- Replace time.Sleep() with polling in daemon tests (PauseResume,
  TimedPauseExpiry, WatchPausedDrive)
- Fix PID isolation: send SIGHUP directly via cmd.Process.Signal()

Documentation:
- ci_issues.md: update §17 (three-layer defense), §19 (serial execution),
  §20 (implemented fix), add §21 (full reconciliation design)
- BACKLOG.md: close B-325, B-326; update B-324

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
